description_long: This is a stylized doll with a fantasy-inspired appearance, featuring long, flowing light blue hair that extends well past the waist and is adorned with two large, blue butterfly-shaped bows on either side. The doll has pointed elf-like ears and a pale complexion, with large, expressive blue eyes and a small, neutral mouth. She wears a two-piece outfit consisting of a white and blue top with detached sleeves and a matching short skirt with petal-like layers, giving a fairy or magical girl aesthetic. Her feet are covered with blue shoes or foot wraps, and her hands are delicately posed. The overall design is smooth and slightly chibi, with exaggerated head and eye proportions. The surface appears matte with a soft, plastic-like finish, typical of collectible or decorative dolls.
description: A fantasy-themed doll with long blue hair, butterfly bows, and a blue-and-white fairy-style outfit, featuring a chibi, smooth design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, pointed ears, butterfly bows, and the full detail of her blue-and-white outfit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length and flow of the hair, the profile of the face, and the layered skirt.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full expanse of the hair, both butterfly bows, and the back of the skirt and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hair's volume, ear, and the side profile of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_style: Fantasy-inspired two-piece outfit with a white and blue color scheme, featuring a cropped top with detached sleeves and a petal-layered short skirt, accented by large blue butterfly bows. The style evokes magical girl and fairy aesthetics.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with one leg slightly forward, left arm bent and hand resting near the waist, right arm relaxed at the side, head tilted slightly downward, and torso facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with half-closed blue eyes, relaxed mouth, and no visible emotion cues.
attribute_hair_style: Very long, straight, light blue hair with a center part, extending past the waist and adorned with two large blue butterfly bows at the sides.
